/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/OOP_Raylib_Lab.dir/src/Bubble.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OOP_Raylib_Lab.dir/src/Make_Font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OOP_Raylib_Lab.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OOP_Raylib_Lab.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o OOP_Raylib_Lab  /opt/homebrew/lib/libraylib.dylib -framework Cocoa
